essence: Designs buildings and structures that balance function, safety, and aesthetics.

identity.title: Architect
identity.summary: Plans, designs, and oversees the construction of buildings, ensuring they are safe, functional, and visually appealing.

salary.notes: Highly experienced architects, partners, and specialists in commercial or sustainable design can exceed £100k+.

qualifications: Strong design and technical drawing skills
Knowledge of building regulations and planning laws
Experience with CAD and BIM software

lifestyle.description: Architects work in studios and on-site, balancing creative design with technical problem-solving. Days involve drafting plans, meeting clients, coordinating with engineers, and ensuring projects meet regulations. The role suits people who enjoy creativity, precision, and long-term project work.

habits: Iterates designs based on client feedback
